article.body_preview:
DHAKA, June 19, 2023 (BSS) - Bangladesh has signed an agreement with Omar to import 0.25 to 1.5 million metric tonnes (MMT) of LNG from Oman's OQ Trading on G-to-G basis for ten-year term from 2026.

Petrobangla Secretary Ruchira Islam on behalf of Bangladesh and OQ Trading Limited Executive Director Said Al Maawali on behalf of Oman signed the agreement at a city hotel.

llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly states a national-level agreement for Bangladesh to import a specified volume of LNG, matching the feature's country-wide 'volume of goods brought in' scope.
